title: 皐月賞の後に・アンクシャス

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This is simply incredible! The winner of the first
race in the Classic Triple Crown series is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (I... didn't lose. I didn't lose, and yet...)
(Urk!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I still feel so overwhelmed by the intensity in her
voice!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Wheeze... Ngah! I'll win the next one... even if it kills me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I've forgotten you, Ticket. I'll beat
you too.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You two are so amazing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Buuut! Didja forget? The next race up's the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Which means I'll be winning! Becoming the Derby Champion is my dream...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And no one's getting in the way of it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DEEERRRBBBYYY! RAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Tch... What's she getting all fired up for after
losing?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not that I can really talk...

Despite her noteworthy victory, Biwa Hayahide
looks troubled.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, no. Everything's fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm not scared about anything!
choice_data_list: Scared? Who said anything about being scared?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Not me! Because I'm not! We're progressing
just fine!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However... we overlooked something, which is
why I made that miscalculation about Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is tenacious and persists at full speed until
the very end... And the ferocity of Taishin's
pursuit is unparalleled.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are first-class competitors in their
own right. They're incredible.

I'm sure Biwa Hayahide has analyzed her
opponents thoroughly, so I'm puzzled as to why
she's still so apprehensive.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We don't have much time left until the Derby. If
we're going to make revisions to our calculations,
we need to hurry.

The next stop on our journey together is the
second race of the Classic Triple Crown tour—the
Japanese Derby.

But hearing such urgency in her voice makes me
worry that something in her is beginning to crack.
